items.summary: Neko Health has raised $700 million to expand its AI body scans in the United States, starting with a clinic in New York. The company’s preventive screening service combines medical imaging, blood tests, proprietary sensors, and clinician review....

items.title: SpaceXAI Open-Sources Grok Build: The Rust Agent Harness, TUI, and Tool Layer Behind Its Coding CLI
items.summary:
SpaceXAI published the Grok Build source on July 15, 2026. The Apache 2.0 Rust tree covers the agent loop, tool dispatch, the TUI, and the extension system. Grok 4.5 stays closed, and external contributions are not accepted.
